description: Camorra clan operating in the Rione Sanità district of Naples, Italy. Founded in the 1980s by Giuseppe Misso, known as 'o nasone. Specialized in bank robberies, postal office heists, and armored truck thefts, as well as usury, counterfeiting, and gold trafficking. Engaged in violent feuds with rival clans, including a split led by Salvatore Torino in 2005.
